name: Ricoh Leasing Company, Ltd.
summary: Ricoh Leasing Company, Ltd. engages in leasing and installment sales, and financial service businesses in Japan. The company was formerly known as Ricoh Credit Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Ricoh Leasing Company, Ltd. in April 1984. Ricoh Leasing Company, Ltd. was founded in 1976 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
